recent_thoughts.thought: I'm fascinated by the complexity of cytochrome P450 enzymes and their diverse roles in various organisms. recent_thoughts.thought: I'm intrigued by the concept of Area Under the Curve (AUC) and its application in pharmacokinetics. It seems to be a way to quantify the exposure of a substance in the body over time. I'm also interested in how AUC can be used to estimate the maximum concentration of a substance in the body and its clearance rate. The idea of using AUC to evaluate the pharmacokinetic properties of a substance is fascinating. I'm not entirely clear on how AUC is calculated, but it seems to involve integrating the concentration of the substance over time. I'd like to learn more about the mathematical aspects of AUC.
